steps.t: Orcs, goblins, bats, and sapper-bomb crates can be found at Atrad-zarakh. King Thráin has commanded you to join in the assault at Atrad-zarakh. You sh…
You have done much to hinder the Orcs and their vile allies at Atrad-zarakh. You should raise a banner of the Haban'akkâ of Thráin at Atrad-zarakh.
